mapper.select: SELECT budget_id, project_id, category, description, amount, used_by, used_at, created_at FROM budget WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY used_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO budget (project_id, category, description, amount, used_by, used_at) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{category}, #{description}, #{amount}, #{usedBy}, #{usedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT category, SUM(amount) AS total FROM budget WHERE project_id = #{projectId} GROUP BY category ORDER BY category
